description_long: This is a large, ornate folding screen cabinet or shelf, featuring multiple vertical panels connected by hinges. The front panels are decorated with traditional East Asian landscape paintings, depicting mountains, trees, and rivers in muted tones. The lower section of each panel is adorned with circular motifs and intricate patterns, framed by a dark, lacquered wood border. The object appears to be constructed primarily from wood, with painted surfaces and possibly some paper or fabric inlays for the artwork. The side views reveal the thinness of each panel and the accordion-like folding structure, suggesting it can be expanded or collapsed. The overall craftsmanship and decorative style indicate it is both a functional and artistic piece, likely used as a room divider or decorative cabinet in urban or residential settings.
description: A large, ornate folding screen cabinet with painted landscape panels and dark lacquered wood framing, featuring intricate decorative motifs.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full expanse of the folding screen, highlighting the detailed landscape paintings and decorative lower motifs.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thin, hinged panels and the accordion-like folding structure, with minimal visible artwork.
description_view_2: The rear or alternate angled view shows the back of the panels, with some surface irregularities and less visible decoration.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again displays the thinness and folding nature of the panels, with partial visibility of the painted surfaces.
